top_signals.title: AryStinger botnet infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide
top_signals.summary: A previously undocumented malware botnet named AryStinger has compromised more than 4,000 outdated routers to turn them into proxies for malicious traffic. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
top_signals.summary: Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Microsoft links Mastra AI supply chain attack to North Korean hackers
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has attributed a recent Mastra AI supply chain attack that compromised more than 140 npm packages to the North Korean hacking group Sapphire Sleet, also known as BlueNoroff. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
